Q: Who is going to win the Orange Cap in IPL 2026? [Ranveer Allahbadia] Jitesh Sharma said "Virat Kohli, No doubt. I feel he is going to break the highest ever runs record in an IPL season, the way he was batting for India, he is looking in sublime touch this time".

Sanjiv Goenka said "For any sports team, until you win, you don’t receive the same level of respect - We’ve made the playoffs twice but that’s clearly not good enough. You win some, you lose some, but we have to win our first trophy". [JioStar]

Pat Cummins said "When I captained Sunrisers Hyderabad for the first time, my followers in Instagram went from 2 million to 3 & half million followers in a month - IPL is a big one, the whole city go behind us". [Business of Sport YT]

Ayush Mhatre batted at number 3 on his IPL debut - scored 32(15) vs Mumbai Indians at Wankhede. 👌 - It will be interesting whether they will play Mhatre or Urvil at 3. Rutu, Sanju, _____, Brevis, Dube, Kartik, Dhoni, Veer might be Top 8.

🚨 11 EMPTY SEATS TO REMEMBER THE TRAGIC LOSS🚨 - Karnataka Cricket Association has decided to unveil a memorial Plaque, along with RCB, it will reserve 11 seats in the Chinnaswamy stadium in the memory of the stampede victims. [TOI]

ICC CEO SANJOG GUPTA 🗣️ "Three of the top four most watched events on streaming platforms everywhere in the world are now matches from ICC events - which demonstrates the scale that cricket's global pinnacle events deliver".
